name: Scallops in Szechwan Spicy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Large scallops, cut in half through the middle
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by combining:
- 2 dried red chile peppers, seeded, soaked for one hour in water, then drained and chopped
- 2 tablespoons Light soy sauce
- 1 teaspoon Sugar
- 1/2 tablespoon Rice wine vinegar
- 1 tablespoon Dry sherry
2. Heat a wok with 1/2 cup fresh peanut oil over medium-high heat until the oil reaches 360 degrees.
3. Add the scallops and fry for just a few minutes, or until they are golden brown. Remove from the oil and set aside on a plate.
4. In the same wok, add 1/2 teaspoon finely grated fresh ginger and cook for about 30 seconds.
5. Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and stir-fry for another 30 seconds.
6. Add 6 green onions, chopped in Chinese style (thinly sliced).
7. Return the scallops to the wok and pour in the prepared sauce mixture. Stir fry for a few more minutes until everything is hot and well combined.
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
